description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the electronuserland/builder:wine Docker image and caches node_modules, .cache/electron and .cache/electron-builder. Define two stages, build and deploy, and apply a before_script that runs yarn install and yarn run install-app-deps to all jobs. In the build stage add a build_job_linux job that executes yarn run dist:linux, mkdir -p ./dist/linux, cp -rf ./dist/*.gz ./dist/linux/, cp -rf ./dist/*.deb ./dist/linux/, and publishes the dist/linux folder as a 1‑week artifact. Add a build_job_macos job that runs yarn run dist:darwin, mkdir -p ./dist/darwin, cp -rf ./dist/*.dmg ./dist/darwin/, and stores dist/darwin as a 1‑week artifact. Add a build_job_win32 job that runs mkdir -p ./dist/win32, yarn run dist:win32, cp -rf ./dist/*.exe ./dist/win32/, and stores dist/win32 as a 1‑week artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that only runs on the master branch, changes into the website directory, runs ./build.sh, creates public/download/linux, win32, macos directories, copies the built .gz, .deb, .exe and .dmg files from the respective dist folders into those public subfolders, and publishes the public folder as the GitLab Pages artifact.
